channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Government announces top-level bureaucratic reshuffle, appoints new secretaries and DGCA chief
item.description: The Government of India announced a major bureaucratic reshuffle on Tuesday, involving several top-level appointments across ministries and departments. Chanchal Kumar, an IAS officer of Bihar cadre, ...

item.title: Volvo Moves All Polestar 3 Manufacturing to South Carolina to Streamline Production
item.description: Volvo and its electric performance brand Polestar have decided to relocate all production of the Polestar 3 SUV from China to the company’s plant in Charleston, South Carolina. The move ends manufactu...

item.title: UDA Alleges Uhuru Kenyatta is Supporting Opposition Against Ruto's Government
item.description: The United Democratic Alliance (UDA) has openly accused former President Uhuru Kenyatta of attempting to undermine President William Ruto’s administration. UDA Secretary General Hassan Omar claimed th...

item.title: King and Queen Will Not Meet Epstein Survivors During Upcoming US State Visit
item.description: The King and Queen of the United Kingdom are scheduled to undertake a state visit to the United States between 27 and 30 April, confirmed by former US President Donald Trump. Despite calls from US Con...

item.title: Insider Update on The Sims 4 Marketplace Success and Project X Development Adjustments
item.description: A recent insider report has shed light on current developments in The Sims franchise, particularly regarding The Sims 4 Marketplace and Project X, a new single-player Sims game in development by Maxis...

item.title: Nigerian Banks Raise Over N4 Trillion to Meet New Capital Requirements
item.description: Over the past two years, Nigerian banks don show say dem sabi handle money matters well, as dem don raise more than N4.6 trillion to meet the Central Bank of Nigeria's new capital requirements. Dis ex...

item.title: Fort Hare places vice-chancellor and three senior managers on precautionary suspension
item.description: The University of Fort Hare has placed its vice-chancellor, Prof Sakhela Buhlungu, on precautionary suspension following an investigation that found he and three other senior management staff failed t...

item.title: Iran attacks tanker near Dubai amid rising Middle East tensions
item.description: Early Tuesday, Iran attacked a Kuwait-flagged crude oil tanker, Al-Salmi, near Dubai, setting it on fire. This came after President Trump threatened to destroy Iran's energy facilities if the Strait o...

item.title: Trump administration admits Strait of Hormuz reopening may take longer than planned amid Iran conflict
item.description: The Trump administration is facing challenges in reopening the Strait of Hormuz as a prerequisite for declaring the war with Iran over. Sources inside the White House indicate that achieving both mili...

item.title: Romeo and Juliet West End production praised for lead performances despite heavy directorial style
item.description: The West End debut of Sadie Sink and Noah Jupe in Robert Icke’s contemporary production of Shakespeare’s Romeo and Juliet has been met with mixed reactions. While Icke’s interpretation demonstrates cr...

item.title: Discovery Health's Approach to Affordable, High-Quality Healthcare in South Africa
item.description: In South Africa, rising living costs are putting pressure on households, and medical aid remains one of the most significant financial commitments for many families. Discovery Health Medical Scheme is...

item.title: Mamata Banerjee alleges BJP submitting fraudulent voter applications in West Bengal
item.description: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee has formally written to the Chief Election Commissioner, Gyanesh Kumar, claiming that the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) is attempting to unlawfully include vo...

item.title: Presales start for Vancouver FIFA Fan Festival with $79 lawn tickets available
item.description: Vancouver has kicked off presales for the highly anticipated FIFA Fan Festival, offering lawn tickets at a price of $79. The festival aims to bring football fans together to watch World Cup matches in...

item.title: Trump criticises European allies amid escalating US-Iran-Israel conflict and fuel supply crisis
item.description: US President Donald Trump openly criticised key European allies, including the United Kingdom and France, for their lack of support during the ongoing US-Israel conflict with Iran. In a strong stateme...

item.title: Top 8 Trusted Gift Card Trading Apps for Nigerians in 2026
item.description: In 2026, the demand for reliable gift card trading apps in Nigeria don tey high as more people dey collect Amazon, Steam, Google Play, Apple, and Sephora gift cards. Na why this guide dey show top 8 a...

item.title: Tamil Nadu Fishermen Stranded in Iran Amid Ongoing Conflict, Families Struggle to Bring Them Home
item.description: Around 600 fishermen from Tamil Nadu, primarily from Kanyakumari and neighbouring districts, are stuck in Iran due to the ongoing war following US and Israeli airstrikes. Many of them are living on bo...

item.title: Scout Boxall explores life, mental health, and Larping in God’s Favourite
item.description: In their latest show, 'God’s Favourite', Scout Boxall presents a deeply personal and humorous account of one of the most challenging nights of their life. During a stay at a caravan park in regional V...

item.title: Said Alkali steps down as Transport Minister to contest Gombe governorship
item.description: The Nigerian Minister of Transportation, Said Alkali, don officially resign from him post after President Bola Tinubu mandate all political appointees wey wan contest election make dem step down by 31...

item.title: Challenges and Opportunities for Nigerian Women Entrepreneurs in Scaling Businesses
item.description: Women entrepreneurs for Nigeria dey ready to expand their businesses, but dem dey face serious wahala with access to finance, proper governance skills, and structured support systems. Women dey run al...

item.title: Seven key factors that contribute to healthy ageing in Australia
item.description: New research from Federation University, led by psychologist Dr Chloe Waddell, has highlighted that ageing well in Australia is about more than just physical health. Interviewing and surveying 722 Aus...
